name: The SaaS Framework
description: For software products, apps, and digital tools

readme.overview: The SaaS Framework is built for software teams that need to move users from signup to activation, conversion, and retention with minimal manual ops.
readme.whyThisPipeline: The 9-stage pipeline follows a practical SaaS lifecycle: signup, onboarding, activation, trial conversion, healthy usage, risk detection, churn, and winback. It gives teams clear intervention points.
readme.whyTheseEmails: The email set covers onboarding, feature education, trial urgency, conversion, re-engagement, and offboarding. Messages are concise and product-first so users always know the next action.
readme.whyTheseBookings: Demo and onboarding calls support both pre-sale and post-sale adoption. Durations and buffers balance calendar efficiency with enough depth to solve real setup issues.
readme.whyTheseAutomations: Automations ensure users are guided at key lifecycle moments: welcome, day-one activation, trial warnings, conversion handoff, inactivity nudges, and churn feedback capture.

voice.personality: smart product person who respects your time

bookingTypes.name: Demo Call
bookingTypes.description: See how it works in 30 minutes. No slides, just the real product.

bookingTypes.name: Onboarding Call
bookingTypes.description: Get set up with a member of our team. We'll configure your account and answer every question.

emailTemplates.name: Welcome
emailTemplates.subject: You're in — here's how to get started

emailTemplates.name: Day 1 Tips
emailTemplates.subject: 3 things to try in your first 10 minutes
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

You signed up yesterday — here are the three things that help new users get value fastest:

1. Set up your first project
2. Invite a teammate
3. Connect an integration

Total: about 7 minutes.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Feature Deep-Dive
emailTemplates.subject: You unlocked something powerful
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Nice work getting set up. You've completed the basics.

Now here's a feature that takes things to the next level — most power users say it's their favorite part of the product.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Trial Expiring
emailTemplates.subject: Your trial ends in 3 days
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your free trial expires in 3 days. You've already invested time setting things up — upgrading keeps everything in place.

Questions? Just reply.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Converted Thank You
emailTemplates.subject: Welcome to the team, {{firstName}}

emailTemplates.name: Re-Engagement
emailTemplates.subject: We noticed you've been away
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

It's been a while since you logged in. No guilt — life happens.

Just wanted to share what's new. If something isn't working, reply to this email.

Hope to see you back.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Exit Survey
emailTemplates.subject: We're sorry to see you go
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We respect the decision. If you have 30 seconds:

1. Why are you leaving?
2. What would bring you back?
3. One thing we could improve?

Your feedback shapes what we build next.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Welcome Back
emailTemplates.subject: Welcome back, {{firstName}}
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Great to have you back! Your account is fully active again. Everything picks up right where you left off.

Welcome home.

{{ownerName}}

fields.label: What problem are you trying to solve?
How many people will use this?
How did you hear about us?

landingPage.headline: {{businessName}}
landingPage.subhead: The simple way to get things done without the tools that slow you down.

seldonExamples.label: Booking
seldonExamples.prompt: Add a feature request form to my demo calls so prospects can list their top 3 needs before we talk
seldonExamples.description: Add feature requests to demo calls

seldonExamples.label: Email
seldonExamples.prompt: Create a 5-email onboarding drip sequence sent on day 1, 3, 7, 14, and 30 with progressive feature tutorials

seldonExamples.label: Forms
seldonExamples.prompt: Add a current tools checklist to my intake form so I know exactly what each user is replacing or supplementing
seldonExamples.description: Add a tools checklist to onboarding

seldonExamples.label: Pages
seldonExamples.prompt: Add a comparison table to my landing page showing my product versus 3 competitors with feature checkmarks and pricing

seldonExamples.label: Automations
seldonExamples.prompt: When a user hasnt logged in for 7 days, send a re-engagement email showing what features they havent tried yet

automationSuggestions.name: Send SMS reminder before demo call
automationSuggestions.message: Reminder: Your demo with {{businessName}} is in 1 hour.
